Video.summary: Prepare to be floored by this 1946 Dodge Power Wagon resto-mod from Vintage Dream Machines.
Video.title: Power Wagon

Video.summary: Behold "Outlaw" VIN #1! Mustang Brothers' supercharged '67 Fastback is a Brittany Blue beast.
Video.title: Mustang Brothers

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton get cracking on a true piece of 90s muscle, their 1990 Mustang.
Video.title: Stumbling Out the Gate

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton get to work on their 1990 Mustang installing a new front and rear suspension.
Video.title: A Pair of New Horseshoes

Video.summary: It's time to triple the horsepower in our 1990 Mustang! Project Fast Lane Fox Body is getting a new heart.
Video.title: This Horse Has Horsepower

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton's 1990 Mustang is about to undergo a major transformation with a new widebody kit.
Video.title: A Bit of Plastic Surgery

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton are set to get their new five-speed transmission into their Fox Body Mustang.
Video.title: Open Heart Surgery

Video.summary: It's all about the looks as Tommy and Peyton start on the interior changes to their 1990 Fox Body Mustang.
Video.title: Saddled Up

Video.summary: See if your top ten muscle car list matches ours.
Video.title: Top 10 American Muscle Part 1

Video.summary: Have we missed any? Here is the conclusion of our top 10 American Muscle Cars.
Video.title: Top 10 American Muscle Part 2

Video.summary: Can our budget build rival a new Lexus?
Video.title: The Perfect Project Car?

Video.summary: We make a plan of attack to resurrect a 1966 Chevy Nova, a first for the Detroit Muscle shop.
Video.title: Basket Case - Rusted, Busted, and Ruined

Image.alt: Basket Case - Rusted, Busted, and Ruined
Basket Case - Rusted, Busted, and Ruined
Basket Case - Rusted, Busted, and Ruined

Video.summary: With the plan laid out, Tommy and Peyton install light frame rails on the 1966 Chevy Nova.
Video.title: Bending the Iron

Video.summary: Is the C5 Corvette Z06 the ultimate bang for your buck track and street car, or is there room for improvement?
Video.title: C5 Z06 Bolt on Power

Video.summary: Adding more Stop and Go to our C5 Corvette Z06 for the track.
Video.title: Adding Stop and Go to a C5 Corvette Z06

Image.alt: Adding Stop and Go to a C5 Corvette Z06
Adding Stop and Go to a C5 Corvette Z06
Adding Stop and Go to a C5 Corvette Z06

Video.summary: Morphing a Firebird into a Trans Am
Video.title: Trans Am Transformation

Video.summary: Building a 500 horse pump gas Pontiac
Video.title: Trans Am Part 2

Video.summary: Upgrading F-body Poncho suspension & brakes
Video.title: Trans Am Part 3 Movie Car Magic

Image.alt: Trans Am Part 3 Movie Car Magic
Trans Am Part 3 Movie Car Magic
Trans Am Part 3 Movie Car Magic

Video.summary: How to build a posi-traction rear end
Video.title: Stout Differential

Video.summary: Modifying Rear Suspension and Frame for Big Power
Video.title: Tough As Nails Trans Am

Video.summary: How-to restore cracked fiberglass body panels, customize fender scoops and remove decals without paint damage.
Video.title: Bandit Body Building

Video.summary: Guest builder Chris Ryan coats our Tribute Trans Am with ebony paint.
Video.title: Beautiful Black Bird

Video.summary: How-to soundproof and refurbish a worn-out interior. Plus the guys show how to make a shaker hood.
Video.title: Interior Creature Comforts

Video.summary: Big inch Pontiac TA gets tuned on the chassis dyno and how to dial in your alignment without going to a shop.
Video.title: Firebird Finale

Video.summary: It's time for the finishing touches on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Finale

Video.summary: This old Bronco is start of Project Crazy Horse and Stacey has got a mess on his hands.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Rust Replacement

Video.summary: We enhance Project Crazy Horse with new suspensions, wheels, and an upgraded axle.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Frame & Chassis

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie refresh their 632 BBC for a street rod. New cam, EFI, and more!
Video.title: 632ci EFI BBC Part 1

Video.summary: 632 BBC dyno time! Forged short block, heads, cam, EFI. Max HP tuning!
Video.title: 632ci EFI BBC Part 2

Video.summary: Can you really build the ultimate off-road vehicle that’s unbreakable? Challenge accepted.
Video.title: Unbreakable Suburban

Video.summary: We’ll drive, teardown, and media blast a 1974 Bronco to uncover what lies beneath 40+ years of abuse.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco

Video.summary: With the help of some master craftsmen, the guys start building a Bronco from the ground up.
Video.title: Building A Bronco

Video.summary: Our ’74 Bronco build is getting a suspension overhaul plus new axles, brakes, wheels and tires!
Video.title: First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension

Image.alt: First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension
First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension
First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension

Video.summary: It’s time to mock everything in place in our 1974 Bronco.
Video.title: Mocking Up a New 1974 Bronco

Video.summary: We welcome legendary custom car builder Chris Ryan and his team to help with our 1974 Bronco.
Video.title: The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors

Image.alt: The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors
The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors
The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors

Video.summary: It’s final assembly for our 1974 Bronco.
Video.title: Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco

Image.alt: Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco
Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco
Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco

Video.summary: We wrap up the assembly of our Bronco.
Video.title: ’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning

Image.alt: ’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning
’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning
’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning

Video.summary: Today we finish the final assembly of our 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco with the installation of the interior.
Video.title: 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll

Image.alt: 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll
1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll
1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll

Video.summary: The guys work hard to finish their 1974 build under the hood, under the frame, and under the top.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas

Image.alt: Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas
Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas
Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas

Video.summary: The guys show off the completed 1974 Bronco on the floor at SEMA.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco Finale

Video.summary: '89 Chevy Silverado sport truck: shakedown run, dyno test, then stripped to the frame for transformation.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 1 Bare Bones

Video.summary: OBS 632 SS Chevy gets suspension mocked up: spring pocket mods, frame work, c-notch, then powder coat.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 2 Chassis Chaos

Video.summary: OBS 632 SS frame mods: boxing plates, fuel tank mockup, clutch install, drivetrain drop.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 3 Building Blocks

Video.summary: The OBS 632 is getting fuel and brake lines, custom exhaust, a stripped cab, and bed mods.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 4 Taking Shape

Video.summary: Our retro 1949 Chevy 3100 will end up with a great new look and Chevy's vintage straight six.
Video.title: ClasSix Part 1

Video.summary: Our classic 1949 Chevy 3100 goes under the knife to get a better front suspension that you can build yourself.
Video.title: ClasSix: Part 2

Video.summary: We're installing the drivetrain for Project ClasSix.
Video.title: ClasSix Part 8: Drivetrain Installation

Video.summary: Project: ClasSix gets a stylized interior and a budget exhaust.
Video.title: Project ClasSix Part: 10 - Interior & Exhaust

Video.summary: It's payoff day for Project: ClasSix!
Video.title: ClasSix: Part 11 - Payoff!

Video.summary: We install a new front axle and suspension on Project Crazy Horse, rejuvenating an old Ford Bronco.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Engine

Video.summary: We're revamping a 1966 Ford Bronco with a new engine and drive train, prepping it for the trails.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Drive Train

Video.summary: We delve into reconstructing our rusty '66 Ford Bronco amidst extensive repairs and modern upgrades.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife

Image.alt: Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife
Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife
Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife

Video.summary: Project Crazy Horse, the ’66 bronco, is back from the paint shop and looking good.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Paint

Video.summary: Crazy Horse is going together fast with everything from seats, to roll bar, to fender flares.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Seats

Video.summary: The final touches are added to Project Crazy Horse: winch, bumpers, and lights.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Completion

Video.summary: Project Crazy Horse is let loose on the trails.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Special
